title: pelargonium × bakerianum
intro: Pelargonium × bakerianum, also known as Cape Rose or Rose Geranium, is a hybrid species of the Pelargonium genus, characterized by its pink or white flowers and fragrant, rose-scented leaves. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its high concentration of geraniol and linalool, which have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × bakerianum include its ability to reduce stress, promote relaxation, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as its potential to help with skin conditions such as acne, eczema, and wounds. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × bakerianum include teas, tinctures, essential oils, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
